validation.invalidEdgeFormat: Invalid edge format (line {{line}}): "{{value}}". Use "u v" or "u v w"; w must be an integer from 1 to 10.
validation.weightOutOfRange: Weight must be an integer between {{min}} and {{max}} (line {{line}}): "{{value}}"
validation.vertexNotFound: Vertex {{vertex}} is not in the vertex list. (line {{line}})

errors.cors: CORS or network error: Unable to connect to the server. Check the request status in the browser developer tools (F12) > Network tab. The server may need to allow CORS.
